creator: alex_y_xu@yahoo.ca
text: looking at the source, python is only used for "make dist" and maybe for pypi distribution. the Arch package does not use python: https://git.archlinux.org/svntogit/community.git/tree/trunk/PKGBUILD?h=packages/knot. I tested the package removing USES = python and it appears to compile and operate correctly.
